labels.notes: Daniel Santos Chua 1:22pm — 26-year-old adult with established ADHD on Concerta, requesting dose increase + DTC + psychiatry referral. SOAP correct. DIAGNOSTIC CODE 314 (Hyperkinetic syndrome of CHILDHOOD) wrong because patient is an adult. OHIP doesn't have a clean adult-ADHD code; closest semantic match is 313 (Behaviour disorders of childhood/adolescence) or 311 (Depressive/non-psychotic disorders), neither perfect. Underlying issue: tools-model didn't account for patient_age (DOB 1999-05-21 = 26y) when scoring code suitability. Billing A007A + Q310A correct.
